title: Alternative Earlygame
description: Reimagines your journey to the furnace, your early game (you CAN punch trees)
body: # Alternative Earlygame ## Synopsis With this mod installed, you have to do some work before being able to craft a furnace. ## Gameplay Crush ores with a Crushing Hammer to obtain their respective shards. Smelt shards in a campfire to get nuggets. Combine Iron Nuggets with Clay to create Reinforced Clay. Cook Reinforced Clay to get Reinforced Bricks, and finally, craft the mighty Furnace from those. Additionally, you gain access to a new building block — the Reinforced Bricks Block. And by the way — the mod adds the Copper Nugget, the missing piece, THE ONE PIECE (yes, one piece is real). Don't worry — this Copper Nugget has the proper Forge tag, so it should integrate with other (technical) mods correctly. Check out the gallery to see all the features! ## Wiki There's no need for a wiki, as in-game advancements will guide you through the mod, and all required recipes can be viewed using the Recipe Book. ## Contributing You are welcome to suggest new features, and you **are** welcome to hurry me up on updates. You can contact me on discord. ![kofi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4be71a956eb99b7cf5ca41da1cc0df26e5f71e7e_0.webp)
